args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

Based on the vacation plans for Hawaii (June 10-20, 2024):

## Essential Items
- Swimwear (for beach days and snorkeling)
- Sunscreen (reef-safe recommended)
- Hiking gear (for Diamond Head hike on June 13)
- Water shoes (for snorkeling at Hanauma Bay)
- Hat and sunglasses

## Clothing
- Casual outfits
- Light jacket (for cooler evenings)
- Beach cover-up
- Workout clothes
- One semi-formal outfit (for the luau on June 16)

## Electronics
- Camera (to capture the beautiful views)
- Phone and charger
- Waterproof phone case

## Documents
- Travel documents (ID, flight tickets, hotel reservations)
- Credit cards and cash
- Travel insurance information

## Health & Toiletries
- Personal medications
- First aid kit
- Insect repellent
- Aloe vera (for potential sun exposure)

## Activities-Specific Items
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins - can also be rented)
- Reusable water bottle
- Day backpack (for hikes and excursions)
- Binoculars (for wildlife viewing)

Have a wonderful trip to Hawaii!
